ActorFrame.children:
<Layer Type="Quad" OnCommand="hidden,1" InitCommand="%function(self)
screen = SCREENMAN:GetTopScreen()
checked = false; mod_plr = {}; mod_firstSeenBeat = GAMESTATE:GetSongBeat(); --necessary to prevent long freezes
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ----------------------THIS IS THE PLACE TO PUT MODS AND STUFF-------------------------- ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
--beat based mods syntax: --{beat_start, beat_end, mods, len_or_end, player_number} mods = {} mods2 = {}
--beat-based ease mods --{beat_start, beat_end, mod_start, mod_end, mod, len_or_end, ease_type, player_number, sustainbeats, optional_param1, optional_param2} --valid ease types are: --linear --inQuad outQuad inOutQuad outInQuad --inCubic outCubic inOutCubic outInCubic --inQuart outQuart inOutQuart outInQuart --inQuint outQuint inOutQuint outInQuint --inSine outSine inOutSine outInSine --inExpo outExpo inOutExpo outInExpo --inCirc outCirc inOutCirc outInCirc --inElastic outElastic inOutElastic outInElastic --can take 2 optional parameters - amplitude & period --inBack outBack inOutBack outInBack --can take 1 optional parameter - spring amount --inBounce outBounce inOutBounce outInBounce
mods_ease = {} --beat-based ease functions --{beat_start, beat_end, mod_start, mod_end, mod_function, len_or_end, ease_type, sustainbeats, optional_param1, optional_param2} --mod_function gets passed a number as a parameter which can then be used to manipulate funcs_ease = {}
--this is both a message broadcaster and a function runner --if you put {beat,'String'}, then 'String' is broadcast as a message on that beat --if you put {beat,function() somecode end}, then function() is run at that beat --see example on beat 0 curaction = 1; --{beat,thing,persists} mod_actions = {}
-- util functions
function rotatePoint(x1, y1, x2, y2, angle) angle = math.rad(angle) local rotatedX = math.cos(angle) * (x1 - x2) - math.sin(angle) * (y1 - y2) + x2; local rotatedY = math.sin(angle) * (x1 - x2) + math.cos(angle) * (y1 - y2) + y2;
return rotatedX, rotatedY end
-- mod table shortcuts -- also, please dont scream at me -- i would use function(...) table.insert(mods, {...}) end but i think thats only for like 5.2 or something which sucks -- table.unpack and unpack dont exist either
local m = function(beat_start, beat_end, modss, len_or_end, player_number) table.insert(mods, {beat_start, beat_end, modss, len_or_end, player_number}) end local me = function(beat_start, beat_end, mod_start, mod_end, mod, len_or_end, ease_type, player_number, sustainbeats, optional_param1, optional_param2) table.insert(mods_ease, {beat_start, beat_end, mod_start, mod_end, mod, len_or_end, ease_type, player_number, sustainbeats, optional_param1, optional_param2}) end local fe = function(beat_start, beat_end, mod_start, mod_end, mod_function, len_or_end, ease_type, sustainbeats, optional_param1, optional_param2) table.insert(funcs_ease, {beat_start, beat_end, mod_start, mod_end, mod_function, len_or_end, ease_type, sustainbeats, optional_param1, optional_param2}) end local ma = function(beat, thing, persists) table.insert(mod_actions, {beat, thing, persists}) end
-- funcs ease but Mix Easings -- itll do half of the ease with one ease function, the other half with another local fem--[[BY]] = function(beat_start, beat_end, mod_start, mod_end, mod_function, len_or_end, ease_type1, ease_type2, sustainbeats, optional_param1, optional_param2) local len = beat_end if len_or_end == 'end' then len = beat_end - beat_start end local increase = mod_end - mod_start
fe(beat_start, len/2, mod_start, mod_start + increase/2, mod_function, 'len', ease_type1, sustainbeats, optional_param1, optional_param2) fe(beat_start + len/2, len/2, mod_start + increase/2, mod_end, mod_function, 'len', ease_type2, sustainbeats, optional_param1, optional_param2) end -- the Meat (aka the mods)
m(0, math.pow(69, 4), '*-1 3.5x', 'end') ma(0, function() P1:x(sw/2); P2:x(sw/2) end, true)
-- rotate ! for i,v in ipairs({0, 1.5, 4, 5.5, 8, 9.5, 12.5, 13.25, 14, 14.75}) do for _,v2 in ipairs({0, 16, 32, 48, 64, 80}) do me(v + v2, 1, 60 * (i%2*2-1), 0, 'confusionoffset', 'len', outSine) end end
-- arrowpath shenanigans for i = 16, 63.75, 0.25 do me(i, 0.5, 90, 0, 'arrowpath'..((i*4-16)%4), 'len', linear) me(i, 0.75, 100, 0, 'longholds'..((i*4-16)%4), 'len', outQuart) me(i, 0.75, 20, 10, 'bumpyx'..((i*4-16)%4), 'len', outSine) end
-- just a slight amount of bumpyx to make arrowpaths look cooler m(0, 64, '*-1 10 bumpyx', 'len') me(0, 64, 0, 700, 'bumpyxoffset', 'len', linear)
m(64, 96, '*-1 60 beat', 'end')
for i = -0.5, 64, 2 do -- move side to side fem(i, 1, sw/3, sw/3 * 2, function(a) P1:x(a) P2:x(a) end, 'len', inExpo, outQuart)
fem(i + 1, 1, sw/3 * 2, sw/3, function(a) P1:x(a) P2:x(a) end, 'len', inExpo, outQuart) end
for i = -0.5, 64 do -- scale up and down fe(i, 0.5, 1, 0.7, function(a) P1:zoomy(a) P2:zoomy(a) end, 'len', inCubic) fe(i + 0.5, 0.5, 0.7, 1, function(a) P1:zoomy(a) P2:zoomy(a) end, 'len', outQuad)
-- move down and up fe(i, 0.5, sh/3 * 1.25, sh/3 * 1.75, function(a) P1:y(a) P2:y(a) end, 'len', inCubic) fe(i + 0.5, 0.5, sw/3 * 1.75, sh/3 * 1.25, function(a) P1:y(a) P2:y(a) end, 'len', outQuad) end
-- girl fe(4.5, 0.9, 0, 180, function(a) P1:rotationz(a) P2:rotationz(a) end, 'len', inOutCubic) fe(6.5, 0.9, 180, 360, function(a) P1:rotationz(a) P2:rotationz(a) end, 'len', inOutCubic)
-- girl fe(20.5, 0.9, 360, 180, function(a) P1:rotationz(a) P2:rotationz(a) end, 'len', inOutCubic) fe(22.5, 0.9, 180, 0, function(a) P1:rotationz(a) P2:rotationz(a) end, 'len', inOutCubic)
for i = 32, 64, 2 do -- rotation ! fe(i, 0.1, 0, 45, function(a) P1:rotationz(a) P2:rotationz(a) end, 'len', inQuad) fe(i + 0.1, 1, 45, 0, function(a) P1:rotationz(a) P2:rotationz(a) end, 'len', outExpo) fe(i + 1, 0.1, 0, -45, function(a) P1:rotationz(a) P2:rotationz(a) end, 'len', inQuad) fe(i + 1.1, 1, -45, 0, function(a) P1:rotationz(a) P2:rotationz(a) end, 'len', outExpo) end
-- oooooooo!!!! ma(61, function() P1:vibrate() P2:vibrate() P1:effectmagnitude(15, 0, 0) P2:effectmagnitude(0, 15, 0) end, true) ma(63, function() P1:stopeffect() P2:stopeffect() end, true)
-- Cuica me(63, 0.25, 50, 0, 'x', 'len', linear) me(63.25, 0.25, -50, 0, 'x', 'len', linear) me(63.5, 0.25, 50, 0, 'x', 'len', linear) me(63.75, 0.25, -50, 0, 'x', 'len', linear)
-- move into Two fem(64, 1, sw/3, sw/3*2, function(a) P1:x(a) end, 'len', inExpo, outQuart)
-- more moving for i = 64.5, 93, 2 do fem(i, 1, sw/3, sw/3 * 2, function(a) P1:x(a) P2:x(sw - a) end, 'len', inExpo, outQuart)
fem(i + 1, 1, sw/3 * 2, sw/3, function(a) P1:x(a) P2:x(sw - a) end, 'len', inExpo, outQuart) end
fem(94, 1, sw/3, sw/2, function(a) P1:x(a) P2:x(sw - a) end, 'len', inExpo, outQuart)
for i = 64.5, 95 do -- scale up and down fe(i, 0.5, 1, 0.7, function(a) P1:zoomy(a) P2:zoomy(a) end, 'len', inCubic) fe(i + 0.5, 0.5, 0.7, 1, function(a) P1:zoomy(a) P2:zoomy(a) end, 'len', outQuad)
-- move down and up, but Reverse fe(i, 0.5, sh/3 * 1.25, sh/3 * 1.75, function(a) P1:y(a) P2:y(sh - a) end, 'len', inCubic) fe(i + 0.5, 0.5, sw/3 * 1.75, sh/3 * 1.25, function(a) P1:y(a) P2:y(sh - a) end, 'len', outQuad) end
-- FUCKing m(83, 0.5, '*-1 stealth, *-1 dark', 'len') m(83.5, 0.1, '*-1 0% stealth, *-1 0% dark', 'len')
fe(95, 95.75, 10, 0, function(a) P1:y(sh/2 + a) P2:y(sh/2 + a * -1) end, 'end', outQuart)
-- do you wanna ride in for i = 96, 120, 4 do me(i, 0.25, 100, 0, 'noteskewx', 'len', linear) me(i + 0.25, 0.25, -100, 0, 'noteskewx', 'len', linear) me(i + 0.5, 0.25, 100, 0, 'noteskewx', 'len', linear) me(i + 0.75, 0.25, -100, 0, 'noteskewx', 'len', linear) me(i + 1, 0.5, 100, 0, 'noteskewx', 'len', linear)
me(i + 1.5, 0.5, -150, 0, 'noteskewx', 'len', linear) end
-- oh yea! this looks cool so m(96, 127, '*-1 120 beat, *-1 20 beatz', 'end', 1) m(96, 127, '*-1 -120 beat, *-1 20 beatz', 'end', 2)
m(96, 127, '*-1 -10 z', 'end', 2)
-- Coloumn Swap me(99, 100, 0, 100, 'invert', 'end', outSine, 1) m(100, 103, '*-1 invert', 'end', 1) me(102, 103, 100, 0, 'invert', 'end', inQuart, 1)
me(99, 100, 0, 100, 'flip', 'end', outSine, 2) m(100, 102, '*-1 flip', 'end', 2) me(102, 103, 100, 0, 'flip', 'end', inQuart, 2)
me(103, 104, 0, -100, 'invert', 'end', outSine, 1) me(103, 104, 0, 100, 'flip', 'end', outSine, 1) m(104, 106, '*-1 -100 invert, *-1 flip', 'end', 1) me(106, 107, -100, 0, 'invert', 'end', inQuart, 1) me(106, 107, 100, 0, 'flip', 'end', inQuart, 1)
me(103, 104, 0, 100, 'invert', 'end', outSine, 2) m(104, 106, '*-1 invert', 'end', 2) me(106, 107, 100, 0, 'invert', 'end', inQuart, 2)
me(106.5, 107, 180, 0, 'confusionoffset', 'end', outQuart)
-- Coloumn Swap 2 me(111, 112, 0, 157, 'confusionoffset', 'end', inQuart, 2) me(111, 112, 0, 50, 'stealth, dark', 'end', inQuart, 2) m(112, 127, '*-1 157 confusionoffset, *-1 50 stealth, *-1 50 dark', 'end', 2)
me(111, 112, 0, 100, 'invert', 'end', outSine, 1) m(112, 114, '*-1 invert', 'end', 1) me(114, 115, 100, 0, 'invert', 'end', inQuart, 1)
me(111, 112, 0, 100, 'flip', 'end', outSine, 2) m(112, 114, '*-1 flip', 'end', 2) me(114, 115, 100, 0, 'flip', 'end', inQuart, 2)
me(115, 116, 0, -100, 'invert', 'end', outSine, 1) me(115, 116, 0, 100, 'flip', 'end', outSine, 1) m(116, 118, '*-1 -100 invert, *-1 flip', 'end', 1) me(118, 119, -100, 0, 'invert', 'end', inQuart, 1) me(118, 119, 100, 0, 'flip', 'end', inQuart, 1)
me(115, 116, 0, 100, 'invert', 'end', outSine, 2) m(116, 118, '*-1 invert', 'end', 2) me(118, 119, 100, 0, 'invert', 'end', inQuart, 2)
-- do you wanna m(136, 156, '*40 50 stealth, *50 dark', 'end') me(136, 136.25, 0, -60, 'mini', 'end', outQuart) m(136.25, 140, '*-1 -60 mini', 'end') me(140, 152, -60, 210, 'mini', 'end', inSine)
-- to make it seem infinite m(146, 152, '*-1 10000 longholds, *-1 1000 drawsize', 'end') m(148, 152, '*10 50 flip', 'end')
for i = 140, 147 do ma(i, function() local x = math.random(sw/5, sw/5*4) local y = math.random(sh/4, sh/4*3) local xrot = math.random(-50, 50) local yrot = math.random(-50, 50) local zrot = math.random(-30, 30)
for i = 1, 2 do local p = _G['P'..i] p:x(x) p:y(y) p:rotationx(xrot) p:rotationy(yrot) p:rotationz(zrot) end end, true) end
ma(148, function() for i = 1, 2 do local p = _G['P'..i] p:x(sw/2) p:y(sh/2) p:rotationx(0) p:rotationy(0) p:rotationz(0) end end, true)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ----------------------If you're starting out, ignore like everything below this-------- ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function modtable_compare(a,b) return a[1] < b[1] end
if table.getn(mod_actions) > 1 then table.sort(mod_actions, modtable_compare) end
self:queuecommand('Update');
end"
UpdateCommand="%function(self)
local beat = GAMESTATE:GetSongBeat()
if beat>=0 and not checked then local ThingsToGrab = {'BPMDisplay','LifeFrame','ScoreFrame','Lyrics','SongBackground','SongForeground','Overlay','Underlay'} local ThingsToHide = {'BPMDisplay','ScoreFrame','Overlay','Underlay'} for pn=1,8 do _G['P'..pn] = SCREENMAN:GetTopScreen():GetChild('PlayerP'..pn) or nil; if _G['P'..pn] then table.insert(mod_plr, _G['P'..pn]) _G['jud'..pn]=_G['P'..pn]:GetChild('Judgment'); _G['com'..pn]=_G['P'..pn]:GetChild('Combo'); end table.insert(ThingsToGrab,'LifeP'..pn); table.insert(ThingsToGrab,'ScoreP'..pn); table.insert(ThingsToHide,'LifeP'..pn); table.insert(ThingsToHide,'ScoreP'..pn); end for i,v in ipairs(ThingsToGrab) do _G[v] = SCREENMAN:GetTopScreen():GetChild(v) or nil end for i,v in ipairs(ThingsToHide) do if _G[v] then _G[v]:hidden(1) end end checked = true; end
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ----------------------Begin table handlers--------------------------------------------- ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
disable = false; if disable ~= true and checked then
if beat > mod_firstSeenBeat+0.1 then -- performance coding!! -- ----------------------- -- Player mod resets -- ----------------------- for i=1,2 do GAMESTATE:ApplyModifiers('clearall',i) if _G['init_modsp'..i] then GAMESTATE:ApplyModifiers(_G['init_modsp'..i],i) end end
------------------------------------------------------------------------------ -- custom mod reader by TaroNuke edited by WinDEU and re-stolen by TaroNuke -- ------------------------------------------------------------------------------ for i,v in pairs(mods) do if v and table.getn(v) > 3 and v[1] and v[2] and v[3] and v[4] then if beat >=v[1] then if (v[4] == 'len' and beat <=v[1]+v[2]) or (v[4] == 'end' and beat <=v[2]) then if table.getn(v) == 5 then GAMESTATE:ApplyModifiers(v[3],v[5]); else GAMESTATE:ApplyModifiers(v[3]); end end end else v[1] = 0; v[2] = 0; v[3] = ''; v[4] = 'error'; SCREENMAN:SystemMessage('Bad mod in beat-based table (line '..i..')'); end end
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- WinDEU's time-based len/end version of the #swag custom mod reader #teamproofofconcept (c) 2015 -- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- if beat > mod_firstSeenBeat+0.1 then -- performance coding!! -- for i,v in pairs(mods2) do if v and table.getn(v) > 3 and v[1] and v[2] and v[3] and v[4] then if mod_time >=v[1] then if (v[4] == 'len' and mod_time <=v[1]+v[2]) or (v[4] == 'end' and mod_time <=v[2]) then if table.getn(v) == 5 then GAMESTATE:ApplyModifiers(v[3],v[5]); else GAMESTATE:ApplyModifiers(v[3]); end end end else v[1] = 0; v[2] = 0; v[3] = 'error'; v[4] = 'error'; SCREENMAN:SystemMessage('Bad mod in time-based table (line '..i..')'); end end end ------------------------------------------------------------- -- exschwasion presents ease mod reader v2.5, compact mode -- ------------------------------------------------------------- if beat > mod_firstSeenBeat+0.1 then -- performance coding!! -- for i,v in pairs(mods_ease) do if v and table.getn(v) > 6 and v[1] and v[2] and v[3] and v[4] and v[5] and v[6] and v[7] then if beat >=v[1] then if (v[6] == 'len' and beat <=v[1]+v[2]) or (v[6] == 'end' and beat <=v[2]) then local strength = v[7](beat - v[1], v[3], v[4] - v[3], v[6] == 'end' and v[2] - v[1] or v[2], v[10], v[11]) local modstr = v[5] == 'xmod' and strength..'x' or (v[5] == 'cmod' and 'C'..strength or strength..' '..v[5]) GAMESTATE:ApplyGameCommand('mod,*-1 '..modstr,v[8]); elseif (v[9] and ((v[6] == 'len' and beat <=v[1]+v[2]+v[9]) or (v[6] == 'end' and beat <=v[9]))) then local modstr = v[5] == 'xmod' and v[4]..'x' or (v[5] == 'cmod' and 'C'..v[4] or v[4]..' '..v[5]) GAMESTATE:ApplyModifiers('*-1 '..modstr,v[8]); end end else SCREENMAN:SystemMessage('Bad mod in beat-based ease table (line '..i..')'); end end end
--------------------------------------------------- -- ease function reader, thanks melody and hal -- --------------------------------------------------- if beat > mod_firstSeenBeat+0.1 then local t = {} for i,v in pairs(funcs_ease) do if v and table.getn(v) > 6 and v[1] and v[2] and v[3] and v[4] and v[5] and v[6] and v[7] then if beat >=v[1] then if (v[6] == 'len' and beat <=v[1]+v[2]) or (v[6] == 'end' and beat <=v[2]) then local strength = v[7](beat - v[1], v[3], v[4] - v[3], v[6] == 'end' and v[2] - v[1] or v[2], v[9], v[10]) v[5](strength) elseif (v[8] and ((v[6] == 'len' and beat <=v[1]+v[2]+v[8]) or (v[6] == 'end' and beat <=v[8]))) then v[5](v[4]) end end table.insert(t,v) else SCREENMAN:SystemMessage('Bad mod in beat-based ease function table (line '..i..')'); end end funcs_ease = t end
------------------------------------------------------------------ -- Perframe stuff (Advanced Techniques involving actual coding) -- ------------------------------------------------------------------
--[[if perframe(0, 31) then -- do stuff end]]
--------------------------------------- -- Actions table -- --------------------------------------- while curaction<=table.getn(mod_actions) and GAMESTATE:GetSongBeat()>=mod_actions[curaction][1] do if mod_actions[curaction][3] or GAMESTATE:GetSongBeat() < mod_actions[curaction][1]+2 then if type(mod_actions[curaction][2]) == 'function' then mod_actions[curaction][2]() elseif type(mod_actions[curaction][2]) == 'string' then MESSAGEMAN:Broadcast(mod_actions[curaction][2]); end end curaction = curaction+1; end end
end
self:sleep(0.01); self:queuecommand('Update');
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ----------------------END DON'T TOUCH IT KIDDO----------------------------------------- ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
end"
/>
